title: College is Bullshit part 1 - Fort Lewis College in Durango, Co

enrichment.summary: Kyle argues that college and K-12 schooling are fundamentally broken systems that waste time and money while giving petty authority to unqualified people. He illustrates this through his personal experience at Fort Lewis College in Durango, CO, where he describes vindictive grading, a manipulative advisor who forced him into an English major, arbitrary bureaucratic obstacles that extended his time to five-plus years without a degree, and ultimately being expelled from the education department for urinating outside near a high school during practicum hours.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: a scam that wastes time and money, gives power to incompetent people, and should be abolished or replaced with self-directed learning
society should separate capable from less capable people but current schooling does the opposite by punishing smart, bored students
superior to traditional schooling; two hours of curriculum a day is sufficient
people are going into debt for nothing, analogous to the military-industrial complex waste
largely unqualified, overpaid, and motivated by ego and job protection rather than student outcomes
